ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
LUG 2019 was held in Houston, Texas from May 14th-19th, 2019 at the [https://conference.cacds.uh.edu/ University of Houston]. For the first time this year, the agenda included two open tutorial sessions on the opening day for new and experienced users and administrators to learn about Lustre. Additionally, the [[Developer_Day_2019-05-14|Lustre Developer Day 2019]] was held on May 14th.
== LUG 2019 Agenda ==
=== Tuesday, May 14th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 8:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-New-User-Class.07.pdf|Lustre New Users Tutorial]]''' : Michael Timmerman, Hewlett Packard Enterprise
|- |''' 1:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Sysadmin-tutorial.pdf|Lustre Day‐to‐Day Operations Tutorial]]''' : Dustin Leverman, ORNL & Rick Mohr, University of Tennessee |}
=== Wednesday, May 15th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 8:45am''' |'''Opening Remarks''' :OpenSFS/University of Houston
|- |''' 9:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Community-Release-Update-Jones.pdf|Community Release Update]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339569115 (video)] :Peter Jones, Whamcloud
|- |''' 9:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-IML-Overview-and-Roadmap-Grund.pdf|IML Overview and Roadmap]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339569894 (video)] :Joe Grund, Whamcloud
|- |''' 10:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_2.13_and-Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.13 and beyond]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339570212 (video)] :Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Flexible_Lustre_Management-Simmons.pdf|Flexible Lustre Management]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339570831 (video)] :James Simmons, ORNL
|- |''' 11:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_View_from_Outside-Brown.pdf|Lustre - A view from the outside]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339571280 (video)] :Neil Brown, SUSE
|- |''' 1:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Security-Buisson.pdf|Lustre Security Update]]''' [https://vimeo.com/showcase/6042401/video/339571635 (video)] :Sébastien Buisson, Whamcloud
|- |''' 2:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Long_Distance_Lustre-Gautam.pdf|Long Distance Lustre Communication]]''' :Raj Gautam, ExxonMobil
|- |''' 2:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-LNet_Feature_Overview-Shehata.pdf|LNet Features Overview]]''' :Amir Shehata, Whamcloud
|- |''' 3:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Quantitative_Approach_All_Flash_Lustre-Lozinskiy.pdf|A Quantitative Approach to Architecting All-flash Lustre File Systems]]''' :Kirill Lozinskiy, LBNL/NERSC
|- |''' 4:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Performance_Lustre_All_Flash_OIST-Tanaka.pdf|Performance Evaluation of Lustre on All‐Flash Storage System at OIST]]''' :Koji Tanaka, OIST Graduate University
|- |''' 4:20pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Optimizations_for_Flash-Ihara.pdf|Lustre Optimizations and Improvements for Flash Storage]]''' :Shuichi Ihara, Whamcloud
|- |''' 4:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Arm_All_Flash-Ward.pdf|Flash Based Lustre Filesystem for the Arm‐based Supercomputer‐Astra]]''' :Lee Ward, Sandia National Laboratories
|- |''' 5:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Hybrid_Storage_with_Lustre-Rutman.pdf|Hybrid Flash/Disk Storage Systems with Lustre]]''' :Nathan Rutman, Cray
|}
=== Thursday, May 16th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 8:45am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Kmesh_Overview-Vinay.pdf|Sponsor Presentation - Kmesh]]''' :Vinay Gaonkar, Kmesh
|- |''' 9:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Public_Clouds-Purushothaman.pdf|Lustre on Public Clouds‐Opportunities, Challenges & Learning]]''' :Saravanan Purushothaman, Kmesh
|- |''' 9:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Managing_Lustre_on_AWS_FSX-Pollock.pdf|Managing Lustre on AWS]]''' :Andy Pollock and Aurélien Degrémont, Amazon
|- |''' 10:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-HSM_Data_Movement_Tiering_Layouts-Evans.pdf|HSM, Data Movement, Tiering, Layouts and More]]''' :Ben Evans, Cray
|- |''' 11:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Smart_Policies_Data_Placement_Tiering_Lustre-LiXi.pdf|Smart Policies for Data Placement and Storage Tiering of Lustre]]''' :Xi Li, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Robinhood_Reports-Hall.pdf|Robinhood Reports: A New Robinhood Web Front to Help Users Find Their Data]]''' :Shawn Hall, NAG (Numerical Algorithms Group)
|- |''' 1:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Leader_Storage_at_Scale-Vershon.pdf|Sponsor Presentation - DDN]]''' :Craig Vershon, DDN
|- |''' 1:45pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Migratefs_Overlay_Filesystem-Thiell.pdf|Migratefs: Overlay Filesystem for Transparent, Distributed Migration of Active Data]]''' :Stéphane Thiell, Stanford
|- |''' 2:05pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_2.12_In_Production-Thiell.pdf|Lustre 2.12 In Production]]''' :Stéphane Thiell, Stanford
|- |''' 2:15pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Cross_Tier_Unified_Namespace-Chaarawi.pdf|Cross‐tier Unified Namespace Update]]''' :Mohamad Chaarawi, Intel
|- |''' 2:45pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-EOFS_Update-Jones.pdf|EOFS update]]''' :Peter Jones, EOFS
|- |''' 2:50pm''' |'''[[Media:LAD19_Announce.pdf|LAD'19 Announcement]]''' :CEA
|- |''' 2:55pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-OpenSFS_Update.pdf|OpenSFS update]]''' :OpenSFS
|- |''' 3:45pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-LFSCK_Performance_Study-Dong.pdf|A Performance Study of Lustre File System Checker: Bottlenecks and Potentials]]''' :Dong Dai, UNC Charlotte
|- |''' 4:15pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Compute_Canada_Deployment_Beluga-Guilbault.pdf|Lustre in the Compute Canada Federation and the Deployment of Beluga]]''' :Simon Guilbault, Calcul Québec
|}
=== Friday, May 17th === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 8:45am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Cray_Sponsor_Presentation.pdf|Sponsor Presentation - Cray]]''' :Cray
|- |''' 9:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Unscratching_Lustre-Harr.pdf|Un‐scratching Lustre]]''' :Cameron Harr, LLNL
|- |''' 9:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Introducing_Pool_Quotas-Spitz.pdf|Introducing Pool Quotas]]''' :Cory Spitz, Cray
|- |''' 10:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Layering_ZFS_Pools_on_Lustre-Mohr.pdf|Layering ZFS Pools on Lustre]]''' :Rick Mohr, University of Tennessee
|- |''' 11:00am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-Lustre_Overstriping_Shared_Write_Performance-Farrell.pdf|Lustre Overstriping‐Improving Shared File Write Performance]]''' :Patrick Farrell, Whamcloud
|- |''' 11:30am''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-PFL_DoM_DNE_Working_Together-Fragalla.pdf|Solving I/O Slowdown: DoM, DNE and PFL Working Together]]''' :John Fragalla and William Loewe, Cray
|- |''' 12:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2019-IO500_Storage_Benchmark_for_HPC-Dilger.pdf|IO-500 - A Storage Benchmark for HPC]]''' :Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud |}
[[Lustre User Group 2018|<- LUG'18]] | [[Lustre User Group 2020|LUG'20 ->]]
